Harvard Health Publishing blog summarizing a major NEJM study; credible institution, useful secondary source

Age & Ageing 2024 — ASPREE study, 9,916 adults 70+; daily nut consumption → 23% lower disability-free survival endpoint risk
Yahoo Health aggregator article — no primary data; removed
Antioxidants 2019 — review of tree nuts and peanuts in adults 55+; covers cardiovascular, cancer, cognitive outcomes; concludes nuts extend health span and lifespan

Nutrients 2023 narrative review — nut consumption and cognition; evidence 'limited and inconclusive'; walnuts most promising; appropriate credibility: emerging
